subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who speaketh the truth and commandeth mankind to the Most Great Uprightness. By the life of God, verily My Cause is mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ینطق بالحق و یامر الناس بالاستقامه الکبری لعمرالله ان امری عظیم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
